ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.quality_notes: Clear text-based PDF with both OCR text and visual image. Good readability.

invoice.quality_notes: Clear text-based PDF. Good readability. Single page invoice.

document_pairing.method: Certificate file (Document A page 1) contains the COO. Invoice file (Document B page 1) contains the invoice. Certificate file page 2 also contains a copy of the same invoice — this embedded copy is NOT used for verification per rule 8.5.0. Verification is performed against Document B (the separate invoice file).

criteria_met: Consignor 'ARA Timber AB' is identifiable as invoice issuer in Document B
Consignee 'Madar Building Materials Co.' is identifiable as Customer in Document B
Invoice number not explicitly referenced in certificate, but consignor and consignee match

lc_check.motivation: No Letter of Credit reference found in the certificate. No field labeled 'L/C', 'Letter of Credit', 'Documentary Credit' or similar. No LC exception activated.

consignor_search.conclusion: Consignor name 'ARA Timber AB' found explicitly in invoice footer and header.

candidates.raw_text: POST BOX NO. 18936, JEDDAH 21425, TEL NO.00966 12 652555, EMAIL:madar@alfozan.com
Jeddah Branch, P O Box # 18936, Jeddah 21425,
candidates.normalized_text: jeddah branch, p o box 18936, jeddah 21425

candidates.raw_text:
REDWOOD - IPO 9213
KD, L/P
V 50x250 - 2 Bundles
V 50x225 - 2 Bundles
VI 25x225 - 8 Bundles
VI 25x200 - 6 Bundles

consignor.certificate_value: ARA Timber AB, Vallgatan 27, 411 16, GOTHENBURG, SWEDEN
consignor.invoice_value: ARA Timber AB, Vallgatan 27, 411 16 GÖTEBORG, Sweden

comparison_steps.description: Search for consignor name 'ARA Timber AB' in all invoice files.
comparison_steps.result: FOUND — 'ARA Timber AB' found explicitly in invoice footer company identification block and in invoice header as 'ARA TIMBER'. Direct match as invoice issuer.

comparison_steps.description: Compare company names: Certificate 'ARA Timber AB' vs Invoice 'ARA Timber AB'.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH — Identical company name after normalization of case.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate country: SWEDEN. Invoice country: Sweden (explicit in footer address). Also confirmed via VAT No prefix SE in 'SE556976003501'.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH — Country verified via explicit address and VAT prefix.

consignor.motivation: Consignor 'ARA Timber AB' in the certificate is explicitly identified as the invoice issuer in Document B. The company name matches exactly. The address is Vallgatan 27 in both documents (GOTHENBURG vs GÖTEBORG is a Swedish/English spelling variation of the same city). Country Sweden is confirmed via the explicit footer address 'Sweden' and the VAT number prefix 'SE'. MATCH.
consignor.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor: 'ARA Timber AB, Vallgatan 27, 411 16, GOTHENBURG, SWEDEN'. Invoice issuer: 'ARA Timber AB, Vallgatan 27, 411 16 GÖTEBORG, Sweden'. Name identical. Address identical (GOTHENBURG = GÖTEBORG, same city, English vs Swedish name). Country: SWEDEN = Sweden. Rule 4.1.0 satisfied — name found explicitly in invoice. Rule 4.1.4 satisfied — country matches. No further sequential testing needed.

consignee.certificate_value: Madar Building Materials Co., POST BOX NO. 18936, JEDDAH 21425, Saudi Arabia
consignee.invoice_value: Madar Building Materials Co., Jeddah Branch, P O Box # 18936, Jeddah 21425, SAUDI ARABIA

comparison_steps.description: Invoice has a 'Customer' field which serves as the primary billing party. Customer: 'Madar Building Materials Co., Jeddah Branch, P O Box # 18936, Jeddah 21425, SAUDI ARABIA'.
Certificate consignee: 'Madar Building Materials Co.' vs Invoice Customer: 'Madar Building Materials Co.'. Identical after normalization.
Certificate: Saudi Arabia. Invoice: SAUDI ARABIA. Identical after case normalization.

consignee.motivation: Consignee 'Madar Building Materials Co.' from the certificate is found in the invoice's Customer field with the same name. The address details are consistent: P.O. Box 18936, Jeddah 21425. The invoice adds 'Jeddah Branch' which is additional address information per rule 4.2.4 — this does not cause MISMATCH. Country: 'Saudi Arabia' matches 'SAUDI ARABIA'. MATCH.
consignee.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee: 'Madar Building Materials Co., POST BOX NO. 18936, JEDDAH 21425, Saudi Arabia'. Invoice Customer: 'Madar Building Materials Co., Jeddah Branch, P O Box # 18936, Jeddah 21425, SAUDI ARABIA'. Company name is identical. Address: POST BOX NO. 18936 = P O Box # 18936 (allowed normalization). 'Jeddah Branch' is additional address info in invoice — not a contradiction. Country matches. Rule 4.2.4 confirms that address differences (additional detail 'Jeddah Branch') do not cause MISMATCH when company name and country match.

comparison_steps.description: No explicit article numbers are used in the certificate. The text 'IPO 9213' is part of the product description, not a standalone article number field. Proceed to Prioritet 2.
Identify the identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning in the certificate: 'REDWOOD - IPO 9213'. Search for this in the invoice Description column.
comparison_steps.result: FOUND — Invoice contains 'REDWOOD - IPO 9213' as the first line of the Description column. Exact match after case normalization.

comparison_steps.description: Invoice contains additional lines under the description: 'KD, L/P', 'V 50x250 - 2 Bundles', 'V 50x225 - 2 Bundles', 'VI 25x225 - 8 Bundles', 'VI 25x200 - 6 Bundles'. These are additional specification details. The identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning 'REDWOOD - IPO 9213' is identified. Additional details do not change product identity.
comparison_steps.result: No impact — additional details per rule 4.3.4.

goods_description.motivation: The identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning 'REDWOOD - IPO 9213' from the certificate is found exactly in the invoice's Description column as 'REDWOOD - IPO 9213'. The invoice contains additional specification lines (KD, L/P, dimension/bundle details) which are non-identity-bearing additions per rule 4.3.4 and do not cause MISMATCH. MATCH.
goods_description.debug_explanation: Certificate goods: 'REDWOOD - IPO 9213'. Invoice Description first line: 'REDWOOD - IPO 9213'. Exact textual match. Additional lines in invoice (KD, L/P, V 50x250, etc.) are product specifications that do not alter the identity of the product. Rule 4.3.3 satisfied via exact match of the main product designation.

quantity.certificate_value: 88,739 cbm (box 7); Gross weight: 52 600 kgs; Net weight: 52 511 kgs (box 6)
quantity.invoice_value: 88,739 cbm; Gross weight: 52 600 kgs; Net weight: 52 511 kgs

comparison_steps.description: Box 7 contains '88,739 cbm'. This is the primary verification quantity. Box 6 also contains 'Gross weight: 52 600 kgs' and 'Net weight: 52 511 kgs' as additional quantity information.
comparison_steps.result: Primary quantity from box 7: 88,739 cbm. Additional quantities from box 6: GW 52 600 kgs, NW 52 511 kgs.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate box 7: 88,739 cbm. Invoice: '18 packages / 88,739 cbm'. The numeric value 88,739 and unit cbm are explicitly present in the invoice.
Certificate: 'Gross weight: 52 600 kgs'. Invoice: 'Gross weight: 52 600 kgs'. Exact match.
Certificate: 'Net weight: 52 511 kgs'. Invoice: 'Net weight: 52 511 kgs'. Exact match.
All three quantity values (volume, GW, NW) match between certificate and invoice. No contradictions found.

quantity.motivation: The primary quantity from box 7 (88,739 cbm) is found explicitly in the invoice ('18 packages / 88,739 cbm'). Both the Gross weight (52 600 kgs) and Net weight (52 511 kgs) from the certificate are also found explicitly in the invoice with identical values and categories. All three quantity values match. No contradictions. MATCH.
quantity.debug_explanation: Certificate box 7: '88,739 cbm'. Invoice: '88,739 cbm' — exact match. Certificate GW: '52 600 kgs'. Invoice GW: '52 600 kgs' — exact match (spaces normalized as thousands separators per 4.4.3.3, both are whole numbers with space as separator). Certificate NW: '52 511 kgs'. Invoice NW: '52 511 kgs' — exact match. All quantities verified via direct occurrence. Rule 4.4.3.1: at least one quantity verified (all three verified). No contradictions.

comparison_steps.description: Invoice contains explicit field 'Country of origin: Sweden'.
comparison_steps.result: FOUND — explicit origin field with value 'Sweden'.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate: 'SWEDEN'. Invoice: 'Sweden'. Case normalization applied. Both normalize to 'sweden'.
Single origin country 'SWEDEN' in certificate. Found as 'Sweden' in invoice's dedicated Country of Origin field. Additionally confirmed by 'MADE IN SWEDEN' in Shipping Marks.

country_of_origin.motivation: Certificate states origin 'SWEDEN' in box 3. Invoice has a dedicated 'Country of origin' field stating 'Sweden'. After case normalization, these are identical. Additionally, invoice Shipping Marks state 'MADE IN SWEDEN', further confirming. Single origin country — no mixed origins complexity. MATCH.
country_of_origin.debug_explanation: Certificate box 3: 'SWEDEN'. Invoice 'Country of origin' field: 'Sweden'. Direct match after case normalization. Invoice also contains 'MADE IN SWEDEN' in shipping marks, providing additional confirmation. Rule 4.5.2 satisfied: single unified origin for all goods.

evidence.description: Invoice issuer VAT number confirming Sweden

evidence.raw_text: Jeddah Branch, P O Box # 18936, Jeddah 21425, SAUDI ARABIA

rule_evaluation_log.motivation: No LC reference found in certificate. No field labeled L/C, Letter of Credit, or Documentary Credit.

Document A (Certificate of Origin) page 1 is the certificate. Document A page 2 contains an embedded copy of the invoice — this is not used for verification. Document B page 1 is the separate invoice file used for verification.
Consignor 'ARA Timber AB' identified as invoice issuer. Consignee 'Madar Building Materials Co.' identified as invoice Customer. Pairing validated.
Consignor 'ARA Timber AB' found explicitly as invoice issuer in footer and header.
Certificate: SWEDEN. Invoice: Sweden (footer address). Confirmed by VAT prefix SE.
VAT number SE556976003501 with SE prefix confirms Sweden.
Invoice has 'Customer' field as primary billing party. Used for consignee verification.
Certificate: 'Madar Building Materials Co.' = Invoice Customer: 'Madar Building Materials Co.'
Saudi Arabia = SAUDI ARABIA after case normalization.
Invoice adds 'Jeddah Branch' — this is additional address detail, not a contradiction. Company name and country match.
'REDWOOD - IPO 9213' found exactly in invoice description.
Invoice contains additional specification lines (KD, L/P, dimensions). These do not affect product identity.
Box 7: 88,739 cbm identified as primary. Box 6 also contains GW and NW.
88,739 cbm found in invoice. GW 52 600 kgs found. NW 52 511 kgs found. All three exact matches.
All quantities (volume, GW, NW) match between certificate and invoice.
Invoice has dedicated 'Country of origin' field: Sweden.
SWEDEN in certificate verified against 'Sweden' in invoice origin field.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Could the embedded invoice in the certificate file (Document A, page 2) be used instead of Document B?
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: Rule 8.5.0 explicitly requires verification against the separate invoice file (Document B), not embedded copies in the certificate file. The embedded invoice is supplementary material.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Could 'IPO 9213' be treated as an article number requiring Prioritet 1 verification?
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: 'IPO 9213' appears as part of the product description ('REDWOOD - IPO 9213'), not as a standalone article number field. It is treated as part of the identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning under Prioritet 2. Both documents use the same format, resulting in exact match.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Could GOTHENBURG vs GÖTEBORG cause a MISMATCH?
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: GOTHENBURG is the English name for GÖTEBORG. Per rule 4.1.5, address differences do not in themselves cause MISMATCH for consignor. The critical elements are company name and country, both of which match exactly.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer överens mellan certifikatet och fakturan. Avsändaren ARA Timber AB, mottagaren Madar Building Materials Co., varubeskrivningen REDWOOD - IPO 9213, kvantiteterna (88,739 cbm, bruttovikt 52 600 kgs, nettovikt 52 511 kgs) och ursprungslandet Sverige är identiska i båda dokumenten. Dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt.
overall_assessment.summary: All five checkpoints verified as MATCH. Consignor, consignee, goods description, quantity, and country of origin all match between certificate and invoice with high confidence. No normalizations required beyond case normalization. No contradictions found.

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot faktura

sections.certificate_value: ARA Timber AB, Vallgatan 27, 411 16, GOTHENBURG, SWEDEN
sections.invoice_value: ARA Timber AB, Vallgatan 27, 411 16 GÖTEBORG, Sweden
sections.rule_applied: Direkt matchning av företagsnamn och land. GOTHENBURG/GÖTEBORG är samma stad (engelskt/svenskt namn).
sections.motivation: Företagsnamnet 'ARA Timber AB' är identiskt i certifikatet och fakturan. Landet Sverige bekräftas via fakturans adressblock och VAT-nummer med SE-prefix.

sections.certificate_value: Madar Building Materials Co., POST BOX NO. 18936, JEDDAH 21425, Saudi Arabia
sections.invoice_value: Madar Building Materials Co., Jeddah Branch, P O Box # 18936, Jeddah 21425, SAUDI ARABIA
sections.rule_applied: Direkt matchning av företagsnamn och land. Adresstillägg 'Jeddah Branch' i fakturan påverkar inte matchningen.
sections.motivation: Företagsnamnet 'Madar Building Materials Co.' är identiskt. Landet Saudi Arabia överensstämmer. P.O. Box 18936 och Jeddah 21425 matchar. Skillnaden 'Jeddah Branch' är ytterligare adressinformation.

sections.rule_applied: Kontrollerad textmatchning. Identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning identisk i båda dokumenten.
sections.motivation: Varubeskrivningen 'REDWOOD - IPO 9213' förekommer ordagrant i både certifikatet och fakturan. Fakturans ytterligare specifikationer (KD, L/P, dimensioner) påverkar inte produktidentiteten.

sections.certificate_value: 88,739 cbm (box 7); Gross weight: 52 600 kgs; Net weight: 52 511 kgs (box 6)
sections.invoice_value: 88,739 cbm; Gross weight: 52 600 kgs; Net weight: 52 511 kgs
sections.rule_applied: Förekomstkontroll. Samtliga kvantitetsvärden (volym, bruttovikt, nettovikt) kan identifieras exakt i fakturan.
sections.motivation: Volymen 88,739 cbm, bruttovikten 52 600 kgs och nettovikten 52 511 kgs överensstämmer exakt mellan certifikatet och fakturan. Inga motsägelser.

sections.rule_applied: Direkt matchning av ursprungsland efter normalisering av versaler/gemener.
sections.motivation: Certifikatet anger ursprungsland 'SWEDEN'. Fakturan anger 'Sweden' i ett dedikerat 'Country of origin'-fält. Identiskt efter normalisering. Ytterligare bekräftat av 'MADE IN SWEDEN' i fakturans Shipping Marks.

human_readable_report.conclusion: Samtliga fem kontrollpunkter (avsändare, mottagare, varubeskrivning, kvantitet och ursprungsland) är verifierade som MATCH. Certifikatet och fakturan överensstämmer. Dokumentparet uppfyller kraven för automatisk godkännandeprocess.

output_quality_checks.notes: All five applicable checkpoints returned MATCH with confidence ≥ 0.97. Overall comparison_result IDENTICAL is consistent. Workflow recommendation AUTO_APPROVAL_ELIGIBLE is consistent with IDENTICAL result.
